series_metadata.series_title: School District Estate Income Tax Return
series_metadata.series_description: Return filed by fiduciary of an estate when decedent was a resident of a school district with an income tax.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 4 years from due date or date filed, whichever is last, then destroy. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: 4 years from due date or date filed, whichever is last, then delete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
